summary: Completed comprehensive testing of admin authentication (JWT-based) and phone validation features for Espace Maxo. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/admin-login with correct password 'Nikeland2016' returns JWT token
✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/admin-login with wrong password returns 401 with 'Mot de passe incorrect'
✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/admin-login with empty password returns 401
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/stats without token returns 401 'Authentification requise'
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/stats with valid JWT token returns stats data
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/stats with invalid token returns 401
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/bookings without token returns 401
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/bookings with valid token returns bookings list
✅ Backend: GET /api/auth/verify without token returns 401
✅ Backend: GET /api/auth/verify with valid token returns {valid: true, role: admin}
✅ Frontend: Admin login page loads with password input and login button
✅ Frontend: Wrong password shows toast 'Mot de passe incorrect'
✅ Frontend: Correct password 'Nikeland2016' navigates to /admin/dashboard
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard displays stats section with today_bookings, paid_bookings, total_revenue
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard displays bookings list with action buttons
✅ Frontend: Logout button visible and accessible
✅ Frontend: Booking page phone validation - 8 digits shows warning 'Format requis: 01XXXXXXXX (8/10 chiffres)'
✅ Frontend: Booking page phone validation - 10 digits not starting with 01 shows warning
✅ Frontend: Booking page phone validation - 10 digits starting with 01 shows 'Format valide'
✅ Frontend: Booking page - Continue button disabled with invalid phone
✅ Frontend: Booking page - Continue button enabled with valid phone (01XXXXXXXX)
✅ Frontend: Booking page - Successfully navigates to Step 2 with valid phone
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin authentication now uses JWT tokens stored in localStorage. Phone validation requires exactly 10 digits starting with '01'. All admin routes require Authorization: Bearer <token> header.
